questions.question: What are members of the Holy Spirit Association for the Unification of World Christianity commonly called?
What future blockbuster filmmaker directed the first Columbo episode?
What Asian gave up his divine status in 1945?
What metal touted for golf clubs is lighter and stronger than titanium, but highly toxic as a raw material?
What does a sumo wrestler sprinkle in the ring to purify both it and himself?
What federal agency was criticized as being "an elite bureaucracy that promotes obscene and blasphemous works"?
questions.answer: The National Endowment for the Arts
